calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., Petitioners Patrick Shun Kang Huang and April Di Yun Huang; father and mother of minos present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Clifford Y. Wang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petitions should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minor 1: from Amity Huang to JAmity Jessie Huang. Minor 2: from Kelly Huang to Kelly Kate Huang. Minor 3: Sammi Huang to Sammi Selena Huang.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
